question: Who is the user of the Butter-Butter Fruit / Bata Bata no Mi?
explainer: The Butter-Butter Fruit / Bata Bata no Mi is eaten by Charlotte Galette. The Bata Bata no Mi is a Paramecia-type Devil Fruit which allows the user to create and control butter, making them a Butter Human.

question: Who is the user of the Glug-Glug Fruit / Gabu Gabu no Mi?
explainer: The Glug-Glug Fruit / Gabu Gabu no Mi is eaten by Vasco Shot. The Gabu Gabu no Mi is a Paramecia-type Devil Fruit that makes the user a Liquor Human. It was eaten by Vasco Shot.

question: Who is the user of the Horse-Horse Fruit / Uma Uma no Mi?
explainer: The Horse-Horse Fruit / Uma Uma no Mi is eaten by Pierre. The Uma Uma no Mi is a Zoan-type Devil Fruit that allows its user to transform into a horse hybrid and a full horse at will.

question: In which region of the world is Wano Country located?
explainer: Wano Country is located in New World. Wano Country is a country in the New World that is unafilliated with the World Government. It is located on the north side of the New World, northwest of Egghead, southwest of Winner Island, and west of Elbaph.

question: In which region of the world is Elbaph located?
explainer: Elbaph is located in New World. Elbaph is a nation in the New World that is inhabited by giants, and is unaffiliated with the World Government. Officially, Elbaph Island contains the Warland Kingdom, but the nation is commonly referred to by the general term "Elbaph".

question: In which region of the world is Impel Down located?
explainer: Impel Down is located in Calm Belt. Impel Down, also known as the Underwater Prison and the Great Prison, is a government-controlled stronghold in Paradise together with Marine Headquarters and Enies Lobby.

question: In which region of the world is Blue Planet located?
explainer: Blue Planet is located in Outer Space. The Blue Planet is the celestial body on which One Piece takes place. While similar to real-life Earth in many aspects, it is drastically different in others.

question: In which region of the world is Totto Land located?
explainer: Totto Land is located in New World. Totto Land is an archipelago in the New World. It constitutes the main territory of one of the former Emperors, Big Mom, and her crew, the Big Mom Pirates, which extends around Whole Cake Island.

question: In which region of the world is Whole Cake Island located?
explainer: Whole Cake Island is located in New World. Whole Cake Island is a New World island under the control of Big Mom, formerly one of the Four Emperors. It is her crew's base of operations and the central island in Big Mom's 35-island archipelago known as Totto Land.

question: In which region of the world is Dressrosa located?
explainer: Dressrosa is located in New World. Dressrosa is an island and kingdom in the New World, and one of the twenty kingdoms that founded the World Government. It was first mentioned by Vergo.

question: In which region of the world is Fish-Man Island located?
explainer: Fish-Man Island is located in Grand Line. Fish-Man Island is the home of the fish-men and merfolk. It serves as an underwater gateway to the New World for those who do not wish (or are not legally permitted) to cross over the Red Line above.

question: Which kingdom does Fish-Man Island belong to?
explainer: Fish-Man Island belongs to the Ryugu Kingdom. Fish-Man Island is the home of the fish-men and merfolk. It serves as an underwater gateway to the New World for those who do not wish (or are not legally permitted) to cross over the Red Line above.

question: In which region of the world is Germa Kingdom located?
explainer: Germa Kingdom is located in North Blue. The Germa Kingdom, also known as the Kingdom of Science, is the world's only seafaring kingdom, and a former member nation of the World Government.

question: In which region of the world is Mary Geoise located?
explainer: Mary Geoise is located in Red Line. The Holy Land Mary Geoise is the capital of the World Government where its top brass reside and govern, the Knights of God have jurisdiction, and where the Celestial Dragons reside.

question: In which region of the world is Sabaody Archipelago located?
explainer: Sabaody Archipelago is located in Paradise. The Sabaody Archipelago is the final island in Paradise, close to the Red Line. Though it is called an archipelago, it is actually a massive mangrove forest growing out from the middle of the ocean with each tree of the forest serving as…

question: In which region of the world is Arabasta Kingdom located?
explainer: Arabasta Kingdom is located in Paradise. The Arabasta Kingdom is a desert kingdom in Paradise. It was the fourth place that the Straw Hat Pirates visited on the Grand Line, and the events here resulted in Luffy's bounty being raised to 100,000,000, and Zoro acquiring a bounty of…

question: In which region of the world is Corrida Colosseum located?
explainer: Corrida Colosseum is located in Dressrosa. The Corrida Colosseum is a colosseum in Dressrosa.

question: In which region of the world is Amazon Lily located?
explainer: Amazon Lily is located in Calm Belt. Amazon Lily is an empire located in Island of Women, an island located in the Calm Belt adjacent to Paradise. The island is inhabited by a tribe of Kuja.

question: In which region of the world is Skypiea located?
explainer: Skypiea is located in Sky. Skypiea is an island located in the sky above Paradise. It is the primary setting of the Skypiea Arc, and the sixth island visited by the Straw Hat Pirates on the Grand Line.

question: In which region of the world is Third Research Institute located?
explainer: Third Research Institute is located in Punk Hazard. The Third Research Institute was a laboratory on Punk Hazard where Vegapunk performed experiments for the World Government.

question: In which region of the world is Loguetown located?
explainer: Loguetown is located in East Blue. Loguetown is a prominent city situated on the Polestar Islands in the East Blue. Spanning nearly the entire island it occupies—save for a few steep hills—it serves as a vital port of call for the surrounding seas.

question: In which region of the world is Skull Dome located?
explainer: Skull Dome is located in Onigashima. The Skull Dome was the main landmark of Onigashima. The castle where the former Emperor Kaidou once lived was built inside of it.

question: In which region of the world is Cacao Island located?
explainer: Cacao Island is located in Totto Land. Cacao Island is one of 34 islands surrounding Whole Cake Island as part of the Big Mom Pirates' main territory known as Totto Land.

question: In which region of the world is Water 7 located?
explainer: Water 7 is located in Paradise. Water 7, known as the "Capital of Water", is a city in Paradise known for its shipwrights. It is the main setting of the Water 7 Arc and Post-Enies Lobby Arc.

question: In which region of the world is Enies Lobby located?
explainer: Enies Lobby is located in Paradise. Enies Lobby was a World Government establishment located on a Paradise island where night never fell. It, along with Impel Down and Marineford, comprised the three major Government strongholds triangulating the Tarai Current via the Gates…

question: In which region of the world is Marineford located?
explainer: Marineford is located in Paradise. Marineford was the island of the base of operations for Marine Headquarters, where now the Marine Base G-1 is situated. It is where former Fleet Admiral Sengoku and the Admirals resided, along with many Vice Admirals and lower officers…

question: In which region of the world is Alubarna located?
explainer: Alubarna is located in Arabasta. Alubarna is the capital city of Arabasta.

question: In which region of the world is Lulusia Kingdom located?
explainer: Lulusia Kingdom is located in Paradise. The Lulusia Kingdom was a historical World Government-affiliated kingdom located in Paradise. It was located south-west to Marine Base G-2, and close to Momoiro Island and Mary Geoise.

question: In which region of the world is Goa Kingdom located?
explainer: Goa Kingdom is located in Dawn Island. The Goa Kingdom is a country located on Dawn Island, in East Blue. It serves as a major setting of the Post-War Arc.

question: In which region of the world is Tontatta Kingdom located?
explainer: Tontatta Kingdom is located in Green Bit. The Tontatta Kingdom is a kingdom underneath Green Bit, and home to the Tontatta Tribe, a tribe of dwarves ruled by king Gancho.

question: In which region of the world is Sorbet Kingdom located?
explainer: Sorbet Kingdom is located in South Blue. The Sorbet Kingdom is a nation in the South Blue that was once ruled by the revolutionary-turned-Warlord, Bartholomew Kuma.

question: In which region of the world is SMILE Factory located?
explainer: SMILE Factory is located in Dressrosa. The SMILE Factory was a hidden facility situated near the secret underground trade port of Dressrosa. As the name of the location implies, the factory produced the artificial Devil Fruits known as SMILEs.

question: In which region of the world is Rainbase located?
explainer: Rainbase is located in Arabasta. Rainbase is a city located in Arabasta. It served as Baroque Works' main headquarters, operated by the organization's president Crocodile (a.k.a Mr.

question: In which region of the world is Sheep's House located?
explainer: Sheep's House is located in Sun World. The Sheep's House was an orphanage on Elbaph run by the nun Carmel. It was where a young Charlotte Linlin stayed as a child 63 years ago.

question: In which region of the world is Moon located?
explainer: Moon is located in Outer space. The Moon is a giant celestial body, a rock-composed sphere, that orbits the Blue Planet. For the world's inhabitants, it is typically the main (if not only) source of natural light at nighttime.

question: In which region of the world is Orange Town located?
explainer: Orange Town is located in Organ Islands. Orange Town is a small, 42-year old town visited by the Straw Hat Pirates during the Orange Town Arc. Its mayor, Boodle, is not only the town's current leader but also one of its founding figures.

question: In which region of the world is Ohara located?
explainer: Ohara is located in West Blue. Ohara is an island located in West Blue. The island consisted primarily of archaeologists, and is the birthplace of Nico Robin.

question: In which region of the world is Nanohana located?
explainer: Nanohana is located in Arabasta. Nanohana is a town in the Arabasta Kingdom. It is a port town known for its great shops and irresistible perfume.

question: In which region of the world is Mock Town located?
explainer: Mock Town is located in Jaya. Mock Town, known as the "Town of Ridicule", is a port town on the western coast of Jaya. It is inhabited mostly by pirates, despite it looking like a resort.

question: In which region of the world is Yuba located?
explainer: Yuba is located in Arabasta. Yuba is a small oasis town in Arabasta where Toto lives.

question: In which region of the world is Flevance located?
explainer: Flevance is located in North Blue. Flevance, also known as the "White City", was a country located in the North Blue, best known as the birthplace of Trafalgar Law.

question: In which region of the world is Island of Rare Animals located?
explainer: Island of Rare Animals is located in East Blue. The Island of Rare Animals, alternatively known as the Legendary Treasure Island in the anime, is an island in the East Blue populated by bizarre "hybrid" animals.

question: Which kingdom does Foosha Village belong to?
explainer: Foosha Village belongs to the Goa Kingdom. Foosha Village (literally meaning "Windmill Village") is a little port village that is located on Dawn Island and is part of Goa Kingdom.

question: In which region of the world is God Valley located?
explainer: God Valley is located in West Blue. God Valley was an island in the West Blue unaffiliated with the World Government, where the so-called God Valley Incident took place 38 years ago.

question: In which region of the world is Arlong Park located?
explainer: Arlong Park is located in Conomi Islands. Arlong Park was the Arlong Pirates' base of operations. It was located on the Conomi Islands.

question: Which kingdom does Kuraigana Island belong to?
explainer: Kuraigana Island belongs to the Shikkearu Kingdom. The Kuraigana Island is a dark and gloomy place somewhere in the Grand Line. It was once the home of the now fallen Shikkearu Kingdom, as well as the ex-Warlord of the Sea Dracule Mihawk.

question: In which region of the world is Drum Castle located?
explainer: Drum Castle is located in Drum Island. Drum Castle is a huge castle located at the top of the largest mountain of the Drum Rockies on Drum Island.

question: In which region of the world is Merveille located?
explainer: Merveille is located in Sky. Merveille, also known as the "Hidden Land in the Clouds" and the "Strong World", is a hidden archipelago of floating isles in the sky above Paradise that served as the base of operations for the Golden Lion Pirates.

question: In which region of the world is Dawn Island located?
explainer: Dawn Island is located in East Blue. Dawn Island is an island located in the East Blue and where the Goa Kingdom is situated. It is the home island of Monkey D.

question: Which kingdom does Dawn Island belong to?
explainer: Dawn Island belongs to the Goa Kingdom. Dawn Island is an island located in the East Blue and where the Goa Kingdom is situated. It is the home island of Monkey D.

question: In which region of the world is Conomi Islands located?
explainer: Conomi Islands is located in East Blue. The Conomi Islands are an archipelago located in the northwestern region of the East Blue. Nami lived there until she joined the Straw Hat Pirates.

question: In which region of the world is Gecko Islands located?
explainer: Gecko Islands is located in East Blue. The Gecko Islands is the archipelago where Syrup Village is located. It is the third island the Straw Hat Pirates visited.

question: In which region of the world is Torino Kingdom located?
explainer: Torino Kingdom is located in South Blue. The Torino Kingdom is an island in the South Blue that some call "Treasure Island". It is a relatively small island with a huge tree growing in the middle of it.

question: In which region of the world is Land of Gods located?
explainer: Land of Gods is located in Underworld. The Land of Gods is a massive, enclosed diorama in a castle on Elbaph where humans live with giant animals, which they consider gods.

question: In which region of the world is Sandora Desert located?
explainer: Sandora Desert is located in Arabasta Kingdom. Sandora Desert is the name of the desert that takes up all of the Arabasta Kingdom, encompassing its towns and landmarks.

question: In which region of the world is Baltigo located?
explainer: Baltigo is located in Grand Line. Baltigo, labeled as the "Island of White Soil", is an island located somewhere in the Grand Line. It was the Headquarters of the Revolutionary Army for years, and the island where Nico Robin spent two years honing her skills.

question: In which region of the world is Gyoncorde Plaza located?
explainer: Gyoncorde Plaza is located in Fish-Man Island. Gyoncorde Plaza is a notable location within the center of Fish-Man Island, specifically within the Ryugu Kingdom.

question: In which region of the world is Aurust Castle located?
explainer: Aurust Castle is located in Branch Route 8. Aurust Castle is the royal castle in the Sun World of Elbaph, hosted in a massive tree by a cliff at the edge of the Western Village.

question: In which region of the world is Walrus School located?
explainer: Walrus School is located in Branch Route 8. The Walrus School is the main educational institution of Elbaph, hosted in the Warrior's Spring alongside the neighboring Owl Library and southwest of Western Village.

question: In which region of the world is Lvneel Kingdom located?
explainer: Lvneel Kingdom is located in North Blue. The Lvneel Kingdom is a kingdom in the North Blue. This is where Mont Blanc Noland was born and where he was executed.

question: In which region of the world is Bighorn located?
explainer: Bighorn is located in Drum Island. Bighorn is a town in Drum Island. It is located near the river the Straw Hat Pirates docked in and also neighbors Cocoa Weed.

question: In which region of the world is Syrup Village located?
explainer: Syrup Village is located in Gecko Islands. Syrup Village, a peaceful settlement located on the Gecko Islands, is the birthplace of Usopp.

question: In which region of the world is Rusukaina located?
explainer: Rusukaina is located in Calm Belt. Rusukaina is an island in the Calm Belt that is to the northwest of Amazon Lily. It is a harsh island that has forty eight seasons a year which change almost weekly.

question: In which region of the world is Weatheria located?
explainer: Weatheria is located in Sky. Weatheria is an artificial sky island. Nami was sent here by Bartholomew Kuma during the events of Sabaody Archipelago, and spent two years on the island honing her skills.

question: In which region of the world is Cocoyasi Village located?
explainer: Cocoyasi Village is located in Conomi Islands. Cocoyasi Village is the village on Conomi Islands where Nami, as well as her sister, Nojiko, grew up with Bell-mère. Situated in close proximity to Arlong Park, the village is home to the majority of key characters featured in the Arlong…

question: In which region of the world is Minion Island located?
explainer: Minion Island is located in North Blue. Minion Island is an island in North Blue. It's the place where Trafalgar Law obtained his Ope Ope no Mi powers and Donquixote Rosinante died by the hands of his elder brother Donquixote Doflamingo.

question: In which region of the world is Shandora located?
explainer: Shandora is located in Sky. Shandora is the ancient city that resided on Jaya, but was later blasted up to Upper Yard by the Knock Up Stream. It was known as the City of Gold.

question: In which region of the world is Candy Factory located?
explainer: Candy Factory is located in Fish-Man Island. The Candy Factory is a new addition to Fish-Man Island. It was created after the death of Whitebeard and loss of his protection over the island.

question: In which region of the world is Owl Library located?
explainer: Owl Library is located in Branch Route 8. The Owl Library is a large building located on Branch Route 8 of Elbaph hanging over the Warrior's Spring southwest of Western Village.

question: In which region of the world is Ilisia Kingdom located?
explainer: Ilisia Kingdom is located in West Blue. The Ilisia Kingdom is a country in the West Blue. It is affiliated with the World Government, and its ruler is allowed a seat at the Levely.

question: In which region of the world is Paradise Farm located?
explainer: Paradise Farm is located in Kuri. The Paradise Farm is a farm located in the Kuri region of Wano Country. It was originally built and owned by Kouzuki Oden, the daimyo of Kuri, and after the Beasts Pirates took over Wano, the farm became the property of Shogun Kurozumi…

question: In which region of the world is Erumalu located?
explainer: Erumalu is located in Arabasta. Erumalu was a town located in the Arabasta Kingdom. Once called the Green City, this town was ravaged by the encroaching sea and the extended drought, the latter caused by Crocodile's use of Dance Powder.

question: In which region of the world is Kano Country located?
explainer: Kano Country is located in West Blue. The country resembles an ancient Chinese city with buildings characterized by Chinese style architecture. It also has several tall rock spires around the city.

question: In which region of the world is Katorea located?
explainer: Katorea is located in Arabasta. Katorea is a town in the Arabasta Kingdom and the headquarters of the Rebel Army.

question: In which region of the world is Headband Catfish Village located?
explainer: Headband Catfish Village is located in Sea Floor. Headband Catfish Village is a small village located beneath the seas of Paradise where many catfish reside.

question: In which region of the world is Whisky Peak located?
explainer: Whisky Peak is located in Cactus Island. Whisky Peak is the only city located on Cactus Island.

question: In which region of the world is Shakky's Rip-off Bar located?
explainer: Shakky's Rip-off Bar is located in Sabaody Archipelago. The Shakky's Rip-off Bar is a bar at Grove 13 of Sabaody Archipelago, and is run by Shakuyaku. It was originally founded on the Pirate Island Hachinosu in the New World.

question: In which region of the world is Spiders Cafe located?
explainer: Spiders Cafe is located in Arabasta Kingdomformer. Spiders Cafe is the name of two desert-based saloons, both operated by "Poison Spider" Zala—under the name of Paula—and tied to Baroque Works.

question: In which region of the world is Gyasta located?
explainer: Gyasta is located in Drum Island. Gyasta is a town located in Drum Island. It was only mentioned as one of Kureha's stops, and a sign pointing to it was shown.

question: In which region of the world is Sakura Kingdom located?
explainer: Sakura Kingdom is located in Drum Island. The Sakura Kingdom (literally meaning "Cherry Blossom Kingdom"), formerly the Drum Kingdom, is a kingdom located on Drum Island.

question: In which region of the world is Sapoten Graveyard located?
explainer: Sapoten Graveyard is located in Cactus Island. Sapoten Graveyard, also known as Cactus Rock is a graveyard located on Whisky Peak. The large, cactus-like appearance of Sapoten Graveyard makes it a notable landmark of Cactus Island.

question: In which region of the world is Funwari Island located?
explainer: Funwari Island is located in Totto Land. Funwari Island is one of 34 islands surrounding Whole Cake Island as part of the Big Mom Pirates' main territory known as Totto Land.

question: In which region of the world is Reverse Mountain located?
explainer: Reverse Mountain is located in Red Line. Reverse Mountain is an extremely tall mountain at one of the points where the four Blues meet and is one of the two known entrances to the Grand Line.

question: In which region of the world is Swallow Island located?
explainer: Swallow Island is located in North Blue. Swallow Island is an island in North Blue. It is found on the south of Minion Island and Rubeck Island.

question: In which region of the world is Vodka Kingdom located?
explainer: Vodka Kingdom is located in Grand Line. The Vodka Kingdom is a World Government affiliated kingdom located in the Grand Line.

question: In which region of the world is Gray Terminal located?
explainer: Gray Terminal is located in Goa Kingdom. The Gray Terminal is a massive junkyard located on Dawn Island north of Mt. Colubo, just outside the great gate of Goa.

question: In which region of the world is Candy Island located?
explainer: Candy Island is located in Totto Land. Candy Island is one of 34 islands surrounding Whole Cake Island as part of the Big Mom Pirates' main territory known as Totto Land.

question: Which kingdom does Fish-Man District belong to?
explainer: Fish-Man District belongs to the Ryugu Kingdom. The Fish-Man District was part of the Ryugu Kingdom that was notorious for being one of the tougher parts of Fish-Man Island.

question: In which region of the world is Spider Miles located?
explainer: Spider Miles is located in North Blue. Spider Miles is a port town within the North Blue region.

question: In which region of the world is Evil Black Drum Kingdom located?
explainer: Evil Black Drum Kingdom is located in South Blue. The Evil Black Drum Kingdom is the kingdom Wapol currently rules with his wife Kinderella and his dog Hakowan by his side.

question: In which region of the world is Mt. Colubo located?
explainer: Mt. Colubo is located in Dawn Island. Mt. Colubo is a location on Dawn Island in the East Blue.

question: In which region of the world is Birka located?
explainer: Birka is located in Sky. Birka was a Sky Island far to the southeast of Skypiea that was destroyed by Enel. It is the birthplace of Enel and his followers.

question: In which region of the world is Ryugu Kingdom located?
explainer: Ryugu Kingdom is located in Sea Floor. The Ryugu Kingdom is the country that King Neptune rules over. It includes all of Fish-Man Island as well as the surrounding areas.

question: In which region of the world is Ballon Terminal located?
explainer: Ballon Terminal is located in Sky. Ballon Terminal is a ruined city located on a Sky Island above the New World.

question: In which region of the world is Bourgeois Kingdom located?
explainer: Bourgeois Kingdom is located in Grand Line. The Bourgeois Kingdom is a kingdom located somewhere in the Grand Line from which Cavendish hails.

question: In which region of the world is Eigis Kingdom located?
explainer: Eigis Kingdom is located in Grand Line. The Eigis Kingdom is a nation somewhere on the Grand Line that is ruled by King Tea IV. The citizens of the kingdom participated in the Eight-Nation Revolution, rebelling against their monarchs.

question: In which region of the world is Vira located?
explainer: Vira is located in Grand Line. Vira is a small country somewhere in the Grand Line. The government was eventually overthrown by the Revolutionary Army.

question: In which region of the world is Tumi located?
explainer: Tumi is located in South Blue. Tumi is a country located in the South Blue. It was conquered by the Revolutionary Army around twelve years ago.

question: In which region of the world is Gosa Village located?
explainer: Gosa Village is located in Conomi Islands. The Gosa Village was a village near Cocoyasi Village in the region of the Conomi Islands.

question: In which region of the world is Spice Bean located?
explainer: Spice Bean is located in Nanohana. Spice Bean is the restaurant that Ace and Luffy stopped by to eat while they were in Nanohana, Arabasta. The owner of the restaurant is Yoshimoto.

question: In which region of the world is Ballywood Kingdom located?
explainer: Ballywood Kingdom is located in West Blue. The Ballywood Kingdom is a nation in the West Blue ruled by King Ham Burger.

question: In which region of the world is Twin Cape located?
explainer: Twin Cape is located in Red Line. Twin Cape is located at the bottom of Reverse Mountain, at the exit that leads into Paradise. The area is located precisely where the Red Line and the Grand Line meet.

question: In which region of the world is Gyoverly Hills located?
explainer: Gyoverly Hills is located in Fish-Man Island. Gyoverly Hills is one of the wealthier towns on Fish-Man Island.

question: In which region of the world is 80th Branch located?
explainer: 80th Branch is located in West Blue. The 80th Branch Base is a Marine Base and the seat of the 80th Marine Branch in West Blue.

question: In which region of the world is Mermaid Cove located?
explainer: Mermaid Cove is located in Coral Hill. Mermaid Cove is the place where the mermaids gather and socialize. They live in a coral mansion on the sea floor of Fish-Man Island, and the employees of Mermaid Cafe live in a dorm in the cove.

question: In which region of the world is Goldfish Empire located?
explainer: Goldfish Empire is located in Sea Floor. The Goldfish Empire is a place on the Sea Floor inhabited by goldfish.

question: In which region of the world is Pasta Lake located?
explainer: Pasta Lake is located in Lulusia Kingdom. Pasta Lake is a restaurant in the Lulusia Kingdom. Portgas D.
